headline: 'Flaccid' Digital Names Like Ebay, PayPal Are Targets for AI-Era Buyouts, Friedberg Says on 'All-In'
summary: A new class of digital companies are ripe for AI-driven transformation, says David Friedberg on the "All-In" podcast.
